scripts.build: node scripts/build-witness-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-event-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-bill-pages.mjs
scripts.build:data: node scripts/build-house-journal-data.mjs && node scripts/build-congressional-reports-data.mjs && node scripts/build-house-expenditure-data.mjs && node scripts/build-house-staff-data.mjs && node scripts/build-lobbyist-data.mjs && node scripts/build-senate-committee-data.mjs && node scripts/build-senate-witness-data.mjs && node scripts/link-senate-published-hearings.mjs
scripts.refresh:lobbyists: npm run refresh:lda && npm run build:lobbyists
scripts.check: for f in scripts/*.mjs *.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
